summary: Extended data foundation testing completed successfully for Occupational Data Platform. All 19 API endpoints tested and passed including 4 new extended data features. Verified extended counts (29 occupations, 39 tasks, 156 scores, 17 compliance rules), Quebec-specific compliance rules, Frey-Osborne automation baselines, and industry-level analytics.
passed_tests: Database status with extended counts - 29 occupations, 39 tasks, 156 automation scores, 17 compliance rules verified
Industries summary endpoint - returns industry-level automation stats including new sectors (Legal, Manufacturing, Education, Retail, Transportation, HR, Marketing)
Quebec compliance endpoint - returns Quebec-specific regulatory rules (OIQ, CNESST, CAI, CPA Quebec, Barreau du Quebec)
Frey-Osborne comparison endpoint - compares F-O baseline probabilities with deterministic scores across occupations
EU AI Act blocked tasks with jurisdiction parameter - properly flags High-Risk and prohibited tasks
High automation tasks across new industries - returns tasks from extended industry data with proper automation scoring
All original 15 API endpoints from previous iteration continue to work correctly
Deterministic automation scoring engine maintains accuracy with extended data
Cross-regional occupation code mapping (O*NET/NOC 2026/ESCO) functional across extended occupations
success_percentage: backend: 100% (19/19 tests passed including 4 new extended data features), frontend: N/A (backend-only testing requested)
